    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AdminCommands
     
    Arena
     
    ArenaCommands
     
    ArenaDataSaver
     
    ArenaKeys
     
    ArenaManager
     
    ArenaOption<T>
     
    ArenaRegistry
     
    ArenaSign
     
    ArenaSignEvents
     
    AutoSaveHandler
     
    BooleanOption
     
    BossBarConfig
     
    BossBarConfig.BossBarData
     
    BossBarManager
    Manages the boss bar display for a Whack Me arena.
    ChatManager
     
    CommandBlockEvents
     
    CommandCategory
     
    ConfigOption<T>
     
    ConfigOptions
     
    Database
     
    DatabaseType
     
    DebugCommands
     
    EmptyRadio
     
    EndingState
     
    EventManager
    Central dispatcher for every Bukkit event emitted by Whack Me.
    EventProfiler
    Collects listener execution timings for events dispatched by EventManager.
    EventRegistry
    Provides read-only discovery helpers for the events exposed by Whack Me.
    EventType
    Lists every Bukkit event exposed by the Whack Me API and associates each logical event type with its concrete implementation class.
    FlatFileStorage
     
    Game
    A single running Whack Me session for an arena.
    GameEndEvent
    Called when a Whack Me run reaches its normal ending phase.
    GameEvent
    Base class for events associated with one Whack Me game session.
    GameEvents
     
    GameManager
     
    GameSound
     
    GameStartEvent
    Called after a Whack Me game enters active play.
    GameState
     
    GameStateChangeEvent
    Called immediately before a Whack Me game changes state.
    GameStateHandler
     
    GameStopEvent
    Called after a Whack Me game has been forcefully stopped and cleaned up.
    GlobalFormatter
     
    InGameState
     
    IntOption
     
    ItemStackSerializer
     
    ItemUtils
     
    Leaderboard<T>
     
    LeaderboardEntry<T>
     
    LeaderboardManager
     
    LineFormatter
     
    ListenerAdapter
     
    LocationsPage
     
    LocationTypeAdapter
     
    Menu
     
    MySQLStorage
     
    NBAPIRadio
     
    OfflineStats
     
    OtherSettingsPage
     
    Page
     
    PlaceholderManager
     
    PlayerCommands
     
    PlayerEvent
    Base class for Whack Me events associated with one Bukkit player.
    PlayerJoinAttemptEvent
    Called after built-in arena checks pass but before a player is added to a Whack Me game.
    PlayerLeaveGameEvent
    Called immediately before a player is removed from a Whack Me game.
    PlayerLeaveGameEvent.LeaveReason
    Describes why a player is being removed from a game.
    PlayerStatisticChangeEvent<T>
    Called before a player's statistic value is stored in the Whack Me user model.
    PlayingCommandPolicy
     
    PointBlock
    Coordinates the lifecycle of one point block.
    PointBlockAppearancePage
     
    PointBlockSettingsDialog
    Builds and applies the per-arena point block settings dialogs.
    PointBlockType
     
    PointHandler
     
    Radio
     
    ResetArenaRecordConfirmationPage
     
    RestartingState
     
    Schedulers
     
    ScoreboardManager
     
    SetupDialogTracker
     
    SetupHomePage
     
    SetupMenu
     
    SetupPage
     
    ShutdownDetector
     
    SignManager
     
    SongSelectionPage
     
    SoundManager
     
    SoundResolver
     
    Statistics
     
    StatisticType<T>
     
    StatsCacheManager
     
    StatsMenu
     
    StopReason
     
    StringUtils
     
    TabCompleters
     
    User
     
    UserManager
     
    Utils
     
    Var
     
    WaitingState
     
    WhackMe
     
    WhackMeEvent
    Base type for every Bukkit event emitted by Whack Me.
